name: THE TAG-ALONG OBSESSION
short_description: 《THE TAG-ALONG OBSESSION》 is a first-person horror puzzle game. You will play Hui Ting and enter the long-abandoned resort to explore the truth of everything. The props survive as much as possible and solve all the mysteries and connections to her own past.
detailed_description:
《THE TAG-ALONG OBSESSION》 based on the Urban Legend. It is a first-person horror puzzle adventure game, Players will play Hui-Ting and go into the situation to understand a series of supernatural phenomenon, and immerse themselves in the story, looking for the answers to everything.

Story :

Hui-Ting was working at a television station. She joined a team that went to a long-abandoned resort for a report, where they encountered red-winged death's-head hawkmoths, and the team had an accident. Hui-Ting was the only one who survived. Even after waking up, she was continually haunted by nightmares and sought help from various spiritual practitioners. One day, she encountered a medium named Mrs. Chen, who warned her that she was possessed by a vengeful spirit, which could endanger her life. To lift this curse, she needed to return to the resort and perform a ritual.

With Mrs. Chen's assistance, Hui-Ting returned to the resort. She faced numerous challenges, uncovered past tragedies, and unraveled a series of mysteries.

How to survive :

• Hide

There are places to hide in each area to avoid the pursuit of ghosts and gain temporary breathing space.

• props

Players can collect different types of props and materials along the way, and use them in a timely manner to increase their chances of survival.

• Solve puzzles

There are various puzzles and mechanisms along the way, as well as the truth of all stories, waiting for you to uncover.

supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
